mapper.select: SELECT INVT_SN, TEXTBOOK_SN, TOT_INVT_CNT, SALABLE_CNT, SALE_CMPL_CNT, RSRV_WAIT_CNT, DMGD_DSPSL_CNT, MIN_KEEP_CNT, INVT_STAT_CD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM TEXTBOOK_INVENTORY WHERE TEXTBOOK_SN = #{textbookSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TEXTBOOK_INVENTORY ( TEXTBOOK_SN, TOT_INVT_CNT, SALABLE_CNT, SALE_CMPL_CNT, RSRV_WAIT_CNT, DMGD_DSPSL_CNT, MIN_KEEP_CNT, INVT_STAT_CD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{textbookSn}, #{totInvtCnt}, #{salableCnt}, NVL(#{saleCmplCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), NVL(#{rsrvWaitCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), NVL(#{dmgdDspslCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), NVL(#{minKeepCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), NVL(#{invtStatCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, '10'), #{rgtrId}, #{lastMdfrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO TEXTBOOK_HISTORY ( TEXTBOOK_SN, IO_TYPE_CD, CHG_CNT, BFR_CHG_CNT, AFT_CHG_CNT, REL_DUTY_TYPE_CD, REL_DUTY_ID, PROC_DT, PROC_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{textbookSn}, #{ioTypeCd}, #{chgCnt}, #{bfrChgCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{aftChgCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{relDutyTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{relDutyId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{procUserId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT INVT_HIST_SN, TEXTBOOK_SN, IO_TYPE_CD, CHG_CNT, BFR_CHG_CNT, AFT_CHG_CNT, REL_DUTY_TYPE_CD, REL_DUTY_ID, PROC_DT, PROC_USER_ID FROM TEXTBOOK_HISTORY h
ORDER BY h.PROC_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
